## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

- Closes #(issue)
- Feature/Fix/Docs/Refactor

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Code cleanup / refactor
- [ ] CI/CD improvement

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing on local environment
- [ ] Tests pass: `cargo test`

## Checklist

- [ ] Code passes `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] Code passes `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, doc comments)
- [ ] TASK.md status updated if applicable
- [ ] No breaking changes (or discussed)
- [ ] Commit messages are conventional

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)

---

## Notes for Reviewers

Any additional context or decisions made during implementation.
